question: Chapters
feedback: The text clearly identifies the main divisions of the work, specifically mentioning the theoretical part (1. nodaļa) and the practical application/results (2. nodaļa and results/conclusions section).

question: Description
feedback: The description is very detailed. It covers not only the topics (steganography history, DOCX structure, XML) but also the specific methodology used in the practical part (dataset size, number of methods, active vs. passive analysis).

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure is easy to follow, moving logically from theoretical foundations to practical experimentation and finally to comparative analysis and conclusions.
